base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of level_9_death_mountain_first_quest — a tile (level_layout) from 1986 legend of zelda. Level 9 'Death Mountain' (shape of skull) — final dungeon. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Level 9 'Death Mountain' (shape of skull) — final dungeon; Ganon + rescued-Zelda; no new item, Silver Arrows to defeat Ganon
